Action: type("Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing this letter to enquire about the position of Manager at AA Technologies Pune.

I have been working as a software engineer for the past few years and I am very interested in the position of Manager at AA Technologies Pune.

I believe that my skills and experience make me a suitable candidate for this position. I would be grateful if you could provide me with more information about the position and the requirements for the role.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]")
